file_name: Questionnaire - Accenture - Ziff Davis' connectivity business_1.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Accenture and/or the Target.

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Accenture and the Target are close competitors and whether there are many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
